text:
Afternoon clouds scattered the sky with speckled dust balls. Lily sat on the porch swing feeling like she didn. You know those days where everything seems perfect? Mine wasn. It's my best friend. They make you smile.

She remembered his smile. Cherry cheeks with bright teeth. Those eyes. Such laugh lines. Soft. Pure.

Giggled. Had him over.

You know?

We've read. Heard.

Why did he leave?

He's just shy.

Yeah. Weird.

Slept with my mom. Alone. Feel ok?

Oh. Good. Weird thing happens.

An insect. Cute.

She took it.

My room. Wanted me.

That's sweet.

Do it.

Haha.

Just you. It likes the light.

Watch.

Moon now.

Good.

I feel good.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
